task: Frame.io review status + Trello grid reader
frameio_status: V4 API metadata include=metadata exposes Status field (select type) with values: Posted, Approved, Needs Review. Updated frameio_client.py _parse_clip to extract review_status. Added --approved and --status CLI filters. Added get_approved_clips() and get_clips_by_status() functions.
trello_reader: Built trello_client.py - reads VURT Content Programming Grid (board qMUj0uK8). Extracts director/producer, type, premiere date, notes, cast mentions, Google Drive links. Fuzzy name matching handles word-order differences (Love Network Jam matches Love Jam Network). CLI: --all, --show, --live, --scheduled, --json.
approved_clips_found: 11 approved clips across 6 shows: Love Network Jam (2), Parking Lot (1), Schemers (2), V2/Mkingpins (1), Love Letter (3), 35 & Ticking (2)
